side_effects.description: Allergic hive reaction all over legs, thighs, and buttocks from Blue Sky Peptides CJC/IPAM approximately 7 years ago; reaction reproduced on returning to Blue Sky; no reaction from other companies including Peptide Science

protocol_notes: Commenter is a medical professional. Reaction attributed to preservatives or fillers used by Blue Sky Peptides specifically. No reaction from Peptide Science or other companies. Recommends switching companies and taking 3-6 months off after a repeated reaction.
